blue_ocean_niches.label: No-Spend Day / Spend-Free Day Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 'no spend day challenges' are viral (TikTok, Reddit). No dedicated streak app. YNAB tracks budget, not streak accountability. Massive overlap with frugal community.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Micro-Savings / $5-a-Day Deposit Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 'save $1 a day' challenges are consistently viral. Round-up apps (Acorns) focus on automation, not habit streaks. Gap: accountability for INTENTIONAL daily savings action.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily / Weekly DCA (Dollar-Cost Averaging) Investment Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — DCA is the most recommended investing strategy. Brokerage apps (Robinhood, Fidelity) are execution tools, not habit streak trackers. Gap: accountability for consistent contribution habit.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily LinkedIn Content Posting Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 'post on LinkedIn daily for 30 days' is now a professional growth trope. Buffer/Hootsuite are schedulers, not streak accountability tools. Clear gap for a simple LinkedIn habit tracker.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Weekly Portfolio / GitHub / Personal Brand Update Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 'update your portfolio' is universal career advice that never gets done. GitHub tracks commits but not portfolio curation. Gap: weekly streak for portfolio/personal brand actions.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Photography / One Photo a Day Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 365 photo projects are extremely popular. Instagram tracks posting, not intent/streak. Gap: a minimalist daily photography streak app separate from social media posting.

blue_ocean_niches.label: No Single-Use Plastic / Plastic-Free Day Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — Plastic Free July challenge is global. Zero waste apps (Olio, Too Good To Go) are swap/food-sharing, not habit tracking. Gap: streak tracker for daily plastic avoidance.
